proposals.title: UP_TRI × Bear: n=96, 94.7% WR, Tier M → boost candidate (TAKE_SMALL)

claim.what: Promote boost_pattern: signal=UP_TRI, regime=Bear (Tier B / TAKE_SMALL)
claim.expected_effect: Surface as Tier-B boost on cohort matches; observed +41.1pp edge over per-signal baseline

evidence: Wilson 95% lower bound 0.8815 well above Tier M floor — sample size adequate
R-multiple 0.61 below Tier S threshold (1.0); promotion is to Tier M (B/TAKE_SMALL) only, not Tier S (A/TAKE_FULL)
risks: Cohort tier may drift on next archive comparison; demotion auto-fires per §3
R-multiple distribution under D-8 review (Day-6 forced-exit dominance per project_anchor §7 D-8)
Regime stability marked shifting with 1 Bear day in trailing 7d; if Bear reasserts while UP_TRI exposure remains elevated (7 of 11 open), activation could rapidly add concentration
approval would propagate overlap to mini_scanner_rules.json

proposed_rule_entry.reason: brain_step4: cohort Tier M, n=96, wr=94.7%, edge +41.1pp

decision_metadata.llm_enrichment_rationale: Step 4 tier classification remains robust (n=96, Wilson lower 0.8815, +41.1pp edge over UP_TRI baseline) with promotion correctly capped at Tier M/TAKE_SMALL given R-multiple 0.61. Cohort is regime-gated to Bear while current regime is Choppy (shifting, 6 days) with 81.82% Choppy exposure across 11 open positions, so activation is deferred and existing concentration is not compounded. Consistent with continuous prior approvals of this exact cohort (2026-04-29 through 2026-06-11) and no trader rejection on record.

proposals.title: Exposure concentration: by_regime = Choppy (81.8%)

claim.what: Concentration risk: by_regime = Choppy; recommended action: Pause new entries in regime=Choppy and signal_type∈{UP_TRI, UP_TRI_SA, BULL_PROXY} until Choppy share drops below 0.75 via natural Day-6 exits; do not add further IT-sector longs while UP_TRI_SA×Choppy×IT remains the top cell.
claim.expected_effect: Trader awareness of tail risk: A Choppy→Bear regime flip unwinds the entire 11-position long-only book simultaneously; without validated cohort edge for Choppy×UP_TRI, there is no statistical basis to absorb the drawdown, and the IT cluster (UP_TRI_SA×Choppy×IT) compounds the sector-level shock.

evidence: No cohort_health tier lookups available for concentration cells — Choppy×UP_TRI edge unvalidated
Book is fully directional long: UP_TRI(7) + UP_TRI_SA(2) + BULL_PROXY(2) = 11/11
UP_TRI_SA×Choppy×IT cell at 18.18% — sector clustering pressure near 0.20 threshold
risks: Recommendation may be over-cautious; concentration may be edge-validated
Trader may already be aware; informational only

proposals.reversibility: Informational warning; no system mutation. Suppresses on next run if concentration drops below threshold.

decision_metadata.recommended_action: Pause new entries in regime=Choppy and signal_type∈{UP_TRI, UP_TRI_SA, BULL_PROXY} until Choppy share drops below 0.75 via natural Day-6 exits; do not add further IT-sector longs while UP_TRI_SA×Choppy×IT remains the top cell.
decision_metadata.tail_risk_scenario: A Choppy→Bear regime flip unwinds the entire 11-position long-only book simultaneously; without validated cohort edge for Choppy×UP_TRI, there is no statistical basis to absorb the drawdown, and the IT cluster (UP_TRI_SA×Choppy×IT) compounds the sector-level shock.
decision_metadata.llm_rationale: Regime concentration is triggered at 0.8182 (Choppy, above the 0.80 threshold) with no validated cohort_health entries supporting the Choppy×UP_TRI exposure — unvalidated edge. The book is also fully directional long (UP_TRI + UP_TRI_SA + BULL_PROXY = 11/11), and combined UP_TRI-family share sits at 9/11 = 81.8% with the UP_TRI_SA×Choppy×IT cell at 18.2% (just below the 0.20 cell threshold). A Choppy→Bear regime flip would unwind the long-heavy book simultaneously with no statistical justification.
